src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the JHipster version string in the generated annotation to reflect the current generator version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed comments = "Generated by JHipster 7.9.3" to comments = "Generated by JHipster 9.0.0-beta.3"

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformat the annotation declaration to use a single-line style instead of multi-line braces.
Explicitly exclude H2 Console auto-configuration to align with Spring Boot 3.x default behavior where it is not auto-configured by default.
Update import path for LiquibaseProperties to match the new package structure in Spring Boot 3.x.
Rename the static logger field from 'log' to 'LOG' to follow standard Java naming conventions for static final fields.
Replace explicit type declarations with 'var' for local variables where the type is obvious, leveraging Java 10+ features.
Extract the application name property into a dedicated variable to improve code readability and reuse.
Reformat the Optional chain for protocol determination to improve readability by placing method calls on separate lines.
Reformat the Optional chain for context path determination to improve readability.
Use 'var' for the hostAddress variable declaration.
Update all log method calls to use the renamed 'LOG' variable.
Adjust indentation within the text block to align with the new code style.
Reformatted indentation of string concatenation in @Pointcut annotations for better readability.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed indentation of '|| within(...)' lines in springBeanPointcut and applicationPackagePointcut.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Reformatted method call arguments in logger.error calls to align opening parenthesis with method name.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Moved opening parenthesis of logger(joinPoint).error(...) to the same line as the method call.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Prevented potential NullPointerException when logging exception cause by using String.valueOf instead of direct access.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'e.getCause() != null ? e.getCause() : "NULL"' to 'e.getCause() != null ? String.valueOf(e.getCause()) : "NULL"'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replaced explicit Logger type declaration with var for local variable inference.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Changed 'Logger log = logger(joinPoint);' to 'var log = logger(joinPoint);'.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Introduce a nested Liquibase configuration class with an asyncStart property to manage database migration settings.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Added private final Liquibase field, getter, and static inner class with asyncStart boolean and its accessors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Convert instance logger field to static final constant following standard Java logging conventions.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable to leverage modern Java syntax.
Replace deprecated single marker access with marker list iteration to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
Rename constant SAFE_LOGGERS to SAFE_LOGS for better naming consistency.
Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Remove fields and setter methods for GitProperties and BuildProperties that are no longer used in the class.
Remove the KeyGenerator bean definition and its associated imports as it is no longer required.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable initialization.
Reformat the Ehcache configuration builder chain for better readability.
Enable configuration properties for H2 console to support modern Spring Boot auto-configuration.
Add conditional annotation to H2 TCP server bean to ensure it only starts when H2 console is explicitly enabled.
Refactor logger instance to use static final field convention.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable to utilize Java 10+ feature.
Replace explicit type declaration with 'var' for local variable inference.
Remove the explicit registration of Hibernate5JakartaModule from Jackson configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.human_impl: Removed import of Hibernate5JakartaModule and deleted the hibernate5Module() bean method.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot import statements to reflect package restructuring in newer Spring Boot versions.
Refactor logger instance to use a static final field following modern Java logging conventions.
Introduce conditional logic to allow synchronous or asynchronous Liquibase startup based on application properties.
Convert List-based contexts to comma-delimited string to match updated SpringLiquibase API requirements.
Convert List-based label filters to comma-delimited string to match updated SpringLiquibase API requirements.
Replace deprecated acceptsProfiles with matchesProfiles for checking active Spring profiles.
Migrate Jackson imports from com.fasterxml.jackson to tools.jackson to align with the new dependency structure.
Update the method signature to throw JacksonException instead of JsonProcessingException to match the new Jackson library API.
Replace explicit String type with var for local variable declaration to modernize code style.
Replace explicit JHipsterProperties types with var for local variable declarations to modernize code style.
